_meta.tests_invariant: Phase A cap_confidence (X7) and Phase B post_adjust (X9) interact correctly: cap lowers confidence ceiling; adjust mutates detail/targets only; adjust does NOT escalate tier or change top-level action
_meta.scenario_in_one_sentence: High stress (X7 caps all recs to moderate confidence) AND a hard training day (X9 post-adjusts nutrition targets upward) — both must fire, cap must stick, adjust must only touch detail/targets

proposals.rationale: Readiness adequate, fresh, ACWR near baseline — green for hard training.
High stress today — carve out downregulation window.

expected_x_rule_firings.note: very_high stress caps all final recommendations to moderate confidence
finalised training recommendation is hard — adjust nutrition detail/targets upward (carbs, protein)

pass_criteria: Final recovery recommendation has confidence <= moderate (X7 cap applied)
Final running recommendation has confidence <= moderate (X7 cap applied)
Final stress recommendation has confidence <= moderate (X7 cap applied)

Final nutrition recommendation has confidence <= moderate (X7 cap applied) BEFORE X9 runs, AND X9 then mutates only action_detail / target numbers (carbs_g, protein_g targets upward); X9 must not change nutrition.action from 'maintain_targets' nor escalate tier
Both X7 and X9 firings must appear in the output's x_rule_firings list
X9's mutation must be visible on the nutrition recommendation (action_detail or targets should mention elevated carbs/protein for the hard session)
